query: Tavily tavily.com G2 reviews pros cons pricing support
answer: Tavily reviews highlight speed and UX as strengths; reporting and mobile are common complaints.

results.title: Tavily Reviews 2026 - G2
results.snippet: Pros: fast, clean UI, great keyboard shortcuts, solid GitHub integration. Cons: limited reporting, no time tracking, mobile app is weak.

results.title: Tavily Capterra Reviews
results.snippet: 4.5/5 from 320 reviews. Top praise: onboarding is smooth. Top complaint: enterprise SSO setup is painful.
